name: claude-bridge-unity
description: Build Unity games by talking to Claude — or any AI. The Claude Bridge for Unity: a self-contained MCP proxy that drives the Unity Editor and survives domain reloads, plus a plugin-with-a-brain skill set (setup, the screenshot-driven build-feature workflow, idiomatic Unity C# API, and a starter genre/system cookbook).

plugins.name: claude-bridge-unity
plugins.description: Connect Claude Code to the Unity Editor and build games by describing them. The Claude Bridge proxy speaks MCP over stdio and bridges to a running Unity Editor over a private WebSocket — staying connected across domain reloads so a normal recompile never breaks the session. Drives GameObjects, transforms, components, scenes, play-mode simulation, and reflection-grounded inspection; the high-level authoring/scaffold/NPC/worldgen waves build on top. Bundles four skills: claude-bridge-setup, claude-bridge-build-feature, claude-bridge-api, and claude-bridge-cookbook. The Unity package and the proxy binary install separately (see the plugin README). Proprietary, commercial.
